message:
fix: Lance 0 rows, bounds checks, memory safety

Lance query fix:
- Fall back to meta.totalRows when protobuf doesn't encode row count
  (Lance v0.3 stores row count in manifest, not in column page metadata)
- Fix dataSize calculation for int32/float32 types (4 bytes, not 8)
- Replace Math.max spread with loop (stack overflow on large arrays)

Memory safety:
- decodePage: bounds check before creating null bitmap Uint8Array
- decompressSnappy: bounds checks on literal reads, copy offsets
- vectorSearch: guard against negative dimensions (dim <= 0)

Robustness:
- Stream buffer: cap at 10MB to prevent unbounded growth
- Local caches: evict oldest entries (metaCache@1000, datasetCache@100)
- stat() error: only swallow ENOENT, re-throw permission/IO errors
